data.intent: Temporary construction-themed login gate for cartercripe.com: public landing (resume/contact) + server-side default-deny gate via Next.js middleware and a shared-password sealed cookie
Scaffold Next.js App Router app and port the approved construction-themed mock-up into the public landing/login page (fonts, assets, single-viewport layout)
Server-side gate: iron-session sealed cookie, login/logout routes with constant-time password check + remember-me, default-deny middleware with public allowlist, placeholder gated /preview page
Production readiness + README setup guide and the interactive Vercel/domain walkthrough; document v3 Supabase upgrade path
